TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tokar, title = Tokar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tokar} }

S.FORM: alang Tokar ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 137 buwan, 355 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 332 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tokar hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tokar hya' ga Makotaay. tay mkyahu' na Tokar hya' ga Patawlinan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tokar ga ungat pqwasan kyokay. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tokar ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 137 buwan, 355 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 332 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 88%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tokar hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tokar hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tokar hya' ga Makotaay. tay mkyahu' na Tokar hya' ga Patawlinan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tokar ga ungat pqwasan kyokay. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tokar ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa makotaaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na tokar ħjaʔ ɣa patawlinan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tokar ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan kjokaj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
